text:
Once upon a time, in a peaceful village nestled between rolling hills and lush forests, there lived an elderly man named Elias. Elias was known for his profound wisdom and was often sought after for guidance. His home, a cozy cabin at the edge of the village, was filled with books and artifacts that whispered tales of distant lands and eras long past.

On a quiet evening, after the sun had dipped below the horizon casting the village in shades of orange and purple, Elias decided to share a story with his granddaughter, Elara. As they sat by the crackling fireplace, their shadows dancing on the walls, Elias began:

"In the heart of time, when the world was new and the stars were unclaimed by any culture, there lived a great and enigmatic dragon named Dralon. Dralon was not your ordinary creature; he possessed the innate ability to transform between his human form and his draconic one in moments of great uncertainty or joy."

Elara listened intently, her youthful eyes
